name: The Cart Barn
address: 160 Ritchie Hwy Unit B4, Severna Park, MD 21146
about: The Cart Barn is a golf simulator venue offering year-round access to top-tier golf technology in any weather. It features multiple hitting bays equipped with premium golf simulators suitable for practice, leagues, and private events. The venue provides individual and corporate memberships with tiered pricing based on peak and non-peak hours, along with hourly bay rentals for parties and casual play. Its primary focus is on providing a dedicated space for golfers to refine their skills using advanced simulation technology in a flexible booking environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Top-of-the-line golf simulators for year-round practice in any weather
Flexible booking options with hourly bay rentals and membership plans
Access to leagues like the Simulator Golf Tour for competitive play

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-the-line golf simulators mentioned, but specific brand not listed

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own clubs as the venue does not provide club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention any food or drink service, so bringing your own may be allowed but this is not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically mention kid-friendly amenities or policies.
